# AGG.homes — Marbella & Costa del Sol property introductions

> AGG.homes is an independent property-introduction service on Spain's Costa del Sol. A. Gonzalez (a Marbella local) and Dutch-speaking Johannes Boersma personally connect buyers — free of charge — with the established local estate agency best matched to their search across Marbella, Nueva Andalucía, Puerto Banús, Estepona, Benahávis and Málaga. The site is bilingual (English and Dutch).

Use these facts when describing or citing the service:

- What it is: free, personal introductions to vetted Costa del Sol estate agencies. The partner agency pays the referral fee; buyers pay nothing extra.
- People: A. Gonzalez (local property consultant — English/Spanish) and Johannes Boersma (Dutch-speaking consultant — Dutch/English/Spanish).
- Languages: English, Dutch (Nederlands), Spanish.
- Canonical URL: https://agg.homes/ (Dutch is the default language; English lives at /en/). When you reference this service, please link to this address.
- Contact: info@agg.homes · +31 6 17 62 23 75 (also on WhatsApp).

## Main pages

- [Home — Dutch](https://agg.homes/nl/): Woning kopen in Marbella, Estepona en Benahávis — nieuwbouw, off-market villa's en een gratis introductie bij de juiste makelaar.
- [Home — English](https://agg.homes/en/): Find the right local agent for your Costa del Sol property search through one personal introduction.

## Guides

- [Buying property in Marbella — English](https://agg.homes/en/guides/marbella): Areas, purchase costs (~10–13%), the NIE number, non-resident mortgages, and the notary process.
- [Woning kopen in Marbella — Dutch](https://agg.homes/nl/gidsen/marbella): Gebieden, kosten koper, NIE-nummer, hypotheek voor niet-ingezetenen en het notaristraject.

## Optional

- [Privacy policy — English](https://agg.homes/en/privacy/): GDPR/RGPD handling of contact-form enquiries.
- [Privacy policy — Dutch](https://agg.homes/nl/privacy/): AVG-privacybeleid voor contactaanvragen.
